name: Moga PAL Source
subtitle: Official AltStore PAL source for Moga, a manga reader client for MangaDex.
description: This is the official AltStore PAL source for Moga, a manga reader client for MangaDex.

apps.name: Moga
apps.subtitle: A thoughtfully designed MangaDex client
apps.localizedDescription:
Moga is a manga reader app built to interface with MangaDex's vast library, with usability and gesture-based UX design at its core. You can:

- Read anything available in MangaDex's library directly
- Log in to your account
- Follow/unfollow mangas
- See recently updated mangas you've followed
- Easy pick-back-up shortcuts (client side)
- Minimize/juggle two mangas at the same time (client side)
- Set language/content preferences (client side)
- And so on.

This app requires that you generate a private client ID if you wish to log in. See https://moga.moe for more info.

versions.localizedDescription: Version 1.0.1 adds a new first-launch onboarding flow, improves Pick Back Up with smarter resume behavior and cleaner actions, refreshes Home and welcome screen layouts for iPhone and iPad, improves content safety and localization, and fixes MangaDex parsing crashes plus several UI issues.
